revision.text:
{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]}} '''Shirahige-Tawara Shrine''' is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki City]], [[Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]]. It was ranked as a [[Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Gosha]] shrine.<ref>[https://rnavi.ndl.go.jp/mokuji_html/023573933.html 大田村誌／2012.3.] リサーチ・ナビ 国立国会図書館</ref> Known for its [[Nigori|Doburoku]] festival.
== Deities ==
* [[Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Amatsuhitakahikoho no Mikoto]]<ref>[http://www.weblio.jp/content/%E7%99%BD%E9%AC%9A%E7%94%B0%E5%8E%9F%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE 白鬚田原神社とは - 神社名] Weblio辞書</ref> * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume|Amen-Ukemikoto]] and 51 others.
== Doburoku Festival == The Doburoku Festival has continued for more than 1,300 years since [[710]] ([[Wadō (era)|Wado]] 3), and is held annually on October 17 and 18.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/enjoy/index.php?action=story&sub_cat_id=3 お祭りやイベント：楽しむ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>。In recent years, many areas have been designated as [[Nigori|Doburoku Special Zones]] where the production of doburoku is allowed, but the shrine was the only one in Kyushu to be authorized by the National Tax Agency before the special zone for structural reform (special zone) began.<ref name="jr-odekake">{{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151003220345/http://guide.jr-odekake.net/event/26673|title=白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り：九州エリア}} JRおでかけネット </ref>
The festival consists of a festival on the day before the festival on October 17 and a grand festival on October 18. Doburoku is served on both days, and on the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. On the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|12=draft}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[Nippō Main Line]] [[Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>
== References == {{Reflist}}

== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[Nippō Main Line]] [[Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|12=draft}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[Nippō Main Line]] [[Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

revision.text:
{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]}} '''Shirahige-Tawara Shrine''' is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki City]], [[Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]]. It was Ranked as a [[Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|Gosha]] shrine.<ref>[https://rnavi.ndl.go.jp/mokuji_html/023573933.html 大田村誌／2012.3.] リサーチ・ナビ 国立国会図書館</ref> Known for its [[Nigori|Doburoku]] festival.
== Deities ==
* [[Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Amatsuhitakahikoho no Mikoto]]<ref>[http://www.weblio.jp/content/%E7%99%BD%E9%AC%9A%E7%94%B0%E5%8E%9F%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE 白鬚田原神社とは - 神社名] Weblio辞書</ref> * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume|Amen-Ukemikoto]] and 51 others.
== Doburoku Festival == The Doburoku Festival has continued for more than 1,300 years since [[710]] ([[Wadō (era)|Wado]] 3), and is held annually on October 17 and 18.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/enjoy/index.php?action=story&sub_cat_id=3 お祭りやイベント：楽しむ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>。In recent years, many areas have been designated as [[Nigori|Doburoku Special Zones]] where the production of doburoku is allowed, but the shrine was the only one in Kyushu to be authorized by the National Tax Agency before the special zone for structural reform (special zone) began.<ref name="jr-odekake">{{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151003220345/http://guide.jr-odekake.net/event/26673|title=白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り：九州エリア}} JRおでかけネット </ref>
The festival consists of a festival on the day before the festival on October 17 and a grand festival on October 18. Doburoku is served on both days, and on the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. On the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[Nippō Main Line]] [[Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]}} '''Shirahige-Tawara Shrine''' is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki City]], [[Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]]. == Deities ==
* [[Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Amatsuhitakahikoho no Mikoto]]<ref>[http://www.weblio.jp/content/%E7%99%BD%E9%AC%9A%E7%94%B0%E5%8E%9F%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE 白鬚田原神社とは - 神社名] Weblio辞書</ref> * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume|Amen-Ukemikoto]] and 51 others.
== Doburoku Festival == The Doburoku Festival has continued for more than 1,300 years since [[710]] ([[Wadō (era)|Wado]] 3), and is held annually on October 17 and 18.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/enjoy/index.php?action=story&sub_cat_id=3 お祭りやイベント：楽しむ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>。In recent years, many areas have been designated as [[Nigori|Doburoku Special Zones]] where the production of doburoku is allowed, but the shrine was the only one in Kyushu to be authorized by the National Tax Agency before the special zone for structural reform (special zone) began.<ref name="jr-odekake">{{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151003220345/http://guide.jr-odekake.net/event/26673|title=白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り：九州エリア}} JRおでかけネット </ref>
The festival consists of a festival on the day before the festival on October 17 and a grand festival on October 18. Doburoku is served on both days, and on the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. On the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[Nippō Main Line]] [[Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

* [[Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Amatsuhitakahikoho no Mikoto]]<ref>[http://www.weblio.jp/content/%E7%99%BD%E9%AC%9A%E7%94%B0%E5%8E%9F%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE 白鬚田原神社とは - 神社名] Weblio辞書</ref> * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume|Amen-Ukemikoto]] and 51 others.
== Doburoku Festival == The Doburoku Festival has continued for more than 1,300 years since [[710]] ([[Wadō (era)|Wado]] 3), and is held annually on October 17 and 18.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/enjoy/index.php?action=story&sub_cat_id=3 お祭りやイベント：楽しむ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>。In recent years, many areas have been designated as [[Nigori|Doburoku Special Zones]] where the production of doburoku is allowed, but the shrine was the only one in Kyushu to be authorized by the National Tax Agency before the special zone for structural reform (special zone) began.<ref name="jr-odekake">{{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151003220345/http://guide.jr-odekake.net/event/26673|title=白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り：九州エリア}} JRおでかけネット </ref>
The festival consists of a festival on the day before the festival on October 17 and a grand festival on October 18. Doburoku is served on both days, and on the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. On the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|qq=}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[Nippō Main Line]] [[Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

revision.text:
{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]}} '''Shirahige-Tawara Shrine''' is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]]. It was Ranked as a [[Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|Gosha]] shrine.<ref>[https://rnavi.ndl.go.jp/mokuji_html/023573933.html 大田村誌／2012.3.] リサーチ・ナビ 国立国会図書館</ref> Known for its [[Nigori|Doburoku]] festival.
== Deities ==
* [[Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Amatsuhitakahikoho no Mikoto]]<ref>[http://www.weblio.jp/content/%E7%99%BD%E9%AC%9A%E7%94%B0%E5%8E%9F%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE 白鬚田原神社とは - 神社名] Weblio辞書</ref> * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume|Amen-Ukemikoto]] and 51 others.
== Doburoku Festival == The Doburoku Festival has continued for more than 1,300 years since [[:en:710|710]] ([[Wadō (era)|Wado]] 3), and is held annually on October 17 and 18.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/enjoy/index.php?action=story&sub_cat_id=3 お祭りやイベント：楽しむ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>。In recent years, many areas have been designated as [[Nigori|Doburoku Special Zones]] where the production of doburoku is allowed, but the shrine was the only one in Kyushu to be authorized by the National Tax Agency before the special zone for structural reform (special zone) began.<ref name="jr-odekake">{{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151003220345/http://guide.jr-odekake.net/event/26673|title=白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り：九州エリア}} JRおでかけネット </ref>
The festival consists of a festival on the day before the festival on October 17 and a grand festival on October 18. Doburoku is served on both days, and on the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. On the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|qq=}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[:en:Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[Nippō Main Line]] [[Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>
== References == {{Reflist}}

{{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ōita Prefecture]] [[Category:Pages with unreviewed translations]] [[Category:Gō-sha]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 4]]
[[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]] }}

* 20 minutes drive from [[:en:Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[Nippō Main Line]] [[Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]}} '''Shirahige-Tawara Shrine''' is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]]. It was Ranked as a [[Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|Gosha]] shrine.<ref>[https://rnavi.ndl.go.jp/mokuji_html/023573933.html 大田村誌／2012.3.] リサーチ・ナビ 国立国会図書館</ref> Known for its [[Nigori|Doburoku]] festival.
== Deities ==
* [[Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Amatsuhitakahikoho no Mikoto]]<ref>[http://www.weblio.jp/content/%E7%99%BD%E9%AC%9A%E7%94%B0%E5%8E%9F%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE 白鬚田原神社とは - 神社名] Weblio辞書</ref> * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume|Amen-Ukemikoto]] and 51 others.
== Doburoku Festival == The Doburoku Festival has continued for more than 1,300 years since [[:en:710|710]] ([[Wadō (era)|Wado]] 3), and is held annually on October 17 and 18.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/enjoy/index.php?action=story&sub_cat_id=3 お祭りやイベント：楽しむ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>。In recent years, many areas have been designated as [[Nigori|Doburoku Special Zones]] where the production of doburoku is allowed, but the shrine was the only one in Kyushu to be authorized by the National Tax Agency before the special zone for structural reform (special zone) began.<ref name="jr-odekake">{{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151003220345/http://guide.jr-odekake.net/event/26673|title=白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り：九州エリア}} JRおでかけネット </ref>
The festival consists of a festival on the day before the festival on October 17 and a grand festival on October 18. Doburoku is served on both days, and on the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. On the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|qq=}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[:en:Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[Nippō Main Line]] [[:en:Kitsuki Station|Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

== Doburoku Festival == The Doburoku Festival has continued for more than 1,300 years since [[:en:710|710]] ([[Wadō (era)|Wado]] 3), and is held annually on October 17 and 18.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/enjoy/index.php?action=story&sub_cat_id=3 お祭りやイベント：楽しむ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>。In recent years, many areas have been designated as [[:en:Nigori|Doburoku Special Zones]] where the production of doburoku is allowed, but the shrine was the only one in Kyushu to be authorized by the National Tax Agency before the special zone for structural reform (special zone) began.<ref name="jr-odekake">{{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151003220345/http://guide.jr-odekake.net/event/26673|title=白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り：九州エリア}} JRおでかけネット </ref>
The festival consists of a festival on the day before the festival on October 17 and a grand festival on October 18. Doburoku is served on both days, and on the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. On the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|qq=}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[:en:Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[:en:Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[:en:Nippō Main Line|Nippō Main Line]] [[:en:Kitsuki Station|Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

* 20 minutes drive from [[:en:Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[:en:Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[:en:Nippō Main Line|Nippō Main Line]] [[:en:Kitsuki Station|Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "prefecture = {{ill|" to "location = {{ill|"
revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q22119048]] Wikidata name: Shirahige tawara-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image = File:Sirahigetahara.jpg|location = {{ill|Kitsuki|qid=Q850359}}|coordinates = {{Coord|33.503211|N|131.549862|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} '''Shirahige-Tawara Shrine''' is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]]. It was Ranked as a [[Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|Gosha]] shrine.<ref>[https://rnavi.ndl.go.jp/mokuji_html/023573933.html 大田村誌／2012.3.] リサーチ・ナビ 国立国会図書館</ref> Known for its [[:en:Nigori|Doburoku]] festival.
== Deities ==
* [[Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Amatsuhitakahikoho no Mikoto]]<ref>[http://www.weblio.jp/content/%E7%99%BD%E9%AC%9A%E7%94%B0%E5%8E%9F%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE 白鬚田原神社とは - 神社名] Weblio辞書</ref> * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume|Amen-Ukemikoto]] and 51 others.
== Doburoku Festival == The Doburoku Festival has continued for more than 1,300 years since [[:en:710|710]] ([[:en:Wadō (era)|Wado]] 3), and is held annually on October 17 and 18.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/enjoy/index.php?action=story&sub_cat_id=3 お祭りやイベント：楽しむ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>。In recent years, many areas have been designated as [[:en:Nigori|Doburoku Special Zones]] where the production of doburoku is allowed, but the shrine was the only one in Kyushu to be authorized by the National Tax Agency before the special zone for structural reform (special zone) began.<ref name="jr-odekake">{{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151003220345/http://guide.jr-odekake.net/event/26673|title=白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り：九州エリア}} JRおでかけネット </ref>
The festival consists of a festival on the day before the festival on October 17 and a grand festival on October 18. Doburoku is served on both days, and on the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. On the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|qq=}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[:en:Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[:en:Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[:en:Nippō Main Line|Nippō Main Line]] [[:en:Kitsuki Station|Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

On the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>

* 20 minutes drive from [[:en:Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[:en:Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[:en:Nippō Main Line|Nippō Main Line]] [[:en:Kitsuki Station|Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Shirahigetawara Shrine]][[ja:白鬚田原神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q22119048]] Wikidata name: Shirahige tawara-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image = File:Sirahigetahara.jpg|location = {{ill|Kitsuki|WD=Q850359}}|coordinates = {{Coord|33.503211|N|131.549862|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} '''Shirahige-Tawara Shrine''' is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]]. It was Ranked as a [[Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|Gosha]] shrine.<ref>[https://rnavi.ndl.go.jp/mokuji_html/023573933.html 大田村誌／2012.3.] リサーチ・ナビ 国立国会図書館</ref> Known for its [[:en:Nigori|Doburoku]] festival.
== Deities ==
* [[Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Amatsuhitakahikoho no Mikoto]]<ref>[http://www.weblio.jp/content/%E7%99%BD%E9%AC%9A%E7%94%B0%E5%8E%9F%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE 白鬚田原神社とは - 神社名] Weblio辞書</ref> * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume|Amen-Ukemikoto]] and 51 others.
== Doburoku Festival == The Doburoku Festival has continued for more than 1,300 years since [[:en:710|710]] ([[:en:Wadō (era)|Wado]] 3), and is held annually on October 17 and 18.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/enjoy/index.php?action=story&sub_cat_id=3 お祭りやイベント：楽しむ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>。In recent years, many areas have been designated as [[:en:Nigori|Doburoku Special Zones]] where the production of doburoku is allowed, but the shrine was the only one in Kyushu to be authorized by the National Tax Agency before the special zone for structural reform (special zone) began.<ref name="jr-odekake">{{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151003220345/http://guide.jr-odekake.net/event/26673|title=白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り：九州エリア}} JRおでかけネット </ref>
The festival consists of a festival on the day before the festival on October 17 and a grand festival on October 18. Doburoku is served on both days, and on the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. On the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|qq=|1=Intangible Folk Cultural Property that need measures such as documentation of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642584}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[:en:Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[:en:Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[:en:Nippō Main Line|Nippō Main Line]] [[:en:Kitsuki Station|Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

* 20 minutes drive from [[:en:Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[:en:Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[:en:Nippō Main Line|Nippō Main Line]] [[:en:Kitsuki Station|Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Shirahigetawara Shrine]][[ja:白鬚田原神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q22119048]] Wikidata name: Shirahige tawara-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image = File:Sirahigetahara.jpg|location = {{ill|Kitsuki|WD=Q850359}}|coordinates = {{Coord|33.503211|N|131.549862|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} '''Shirahige-Tawara Shrine''' is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]]. It was Ranked as a [[Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|Gosha]] shrine.<ref>[https://rnavi.ndl.go.jp/mokuji_html/023573933.html 大田村誌／2012.3.] リサーチ・ナビ 国立国会図書館</ref> Known for its [[:en:Nigori|Doburoku]] festival.
== Deities ==
* [[Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Amatsuhitakahikoho no Mikoto]]<ref>[http://www.weblio.jp/content/%E7%99%BD%E9%AC%9A%E7%94%B0%E5%8E%9F%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE 白鬚田原神社とは - 神社名] Weblio辞書</ref> * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume|Amen-Ukemikoto]] and 51 others.
== Doburoku Festival == The Doburoku Festival has continued for more than 1,300 years since [[:en:710|710]] ([[:en:Wadō (era)|Wado]] 3), and is held annually on October 17 and 18.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/enjoy/index.php?action=story&sub_cat_id=3 お祭りやイベント：楽しむ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>。In recent years, many areas have been designated as [[:en:Nigori|Doburoku Special Zones]] where the production of doburoku is allowed, but the shrine was the only one in Kyushu to be authorized by the National Tax Agency before the special zone for structural reform (special zone) began.<ref name="jr-odekake">{{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151003220345/http://guide.jr-odekake.net/event/26673|title=白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り：九州エリア}} JRおでかけネット </ref>
The festival consists of a festival on the day before the festival on October 17 and a grand festival on October 18. Doburoku is served on both days, and on the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. On the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|1=Intangible Folk Cultural Property that need measures such as documentation of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642584}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[:en:Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[:en:Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[:en:Nippō Main Line|Nippō Main Line]] [[:en:Kitsuki Station|Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

* 20 minutes drive from [[:en:Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[:en:Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[:en:Nippō Main Line|Nippō Main Line]] [[:en:Kitsuki Station|Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Shirahigetawara Shrine]][[ja:白鬚田原神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q22119048]] Wikidata name: Shirahige tawara-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image = File:Sirahigetahara.jpg|location = {{ill|Kitsuki|WD=Q850359}}|coordinates = {{Coord|33.503211|N|131.549862|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} '''Shirahige-Tawara Shrine''' is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]]. It was Ranked as a [[Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|Gosha]] shrine.<ref>[https://rnavi.ndl.go.jp/mokuji_html/023573933.html 大田村誌／2012.3.] リサーチ・ナビ 国立国会図書館</ref> Known for its [[:en:Nigori|Doburoku]] festival.
== Deities ==
* [[Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Amatsuhitakahikoho no Mikoto]]<ref>[http://www.weblio.jp/content/%E7%99%BD%E9%AC%9A%E7%94%B0%E5%8E%9F%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE 白鬚田原神社とは - 神社名] Weblio辞書</ref> * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume|Amen-Ukemikoto]] and 51 others.
== Doburoku Festival == The Doburoku Festival has continued for more than 1,300 years since [[:en:710|710]] ([[:en:Wadō (era)|Wado]] 3), and is held annually on October 17 and 18.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/enjoy/index.php?action=story&sub_cat_id=3 お祭りやイベント：楽しむ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>。In recent years, many areas have been designated as [[:en:Nigori|Doburoku Special Zones]] where the production of doburoku is allowed, but the shrine was the only one in Kyushu to be authorized by the National Tax Agency before the special zone for structural reform (special zone) began.<ref name="jr-odekake">{{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151003220345/http://guide.jr-odekake.net/event/26673|title=白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り：九州エリア}} JRおでかけネット </ref>
The festival consists of a festival on the day before the festival on October 17 and a grand festival on October 18. Doburoku is served on both days, and on the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. On the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|1=Intangible Folk Cultural Property that need measures such as documentation of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642584}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==

The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|1=Intangible Folk Cultural Property that need measures such as documentation of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642584}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[:en:Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[:en:Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[:en:Nippō Main Line|Nippō Main Line]] [[:en:Kitsuki Station|Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Shirahigetawara Shrine]][[ja:白鬚田原神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q22119048]] Wikidata name: Shirahige tawara-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image = File:Sirahigetahara.jpg|location = {{ill|Kitsuki|WD=Q850359}}|coordinates = {{Coord|33.503211|N|131.549862|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} '''Shirahige-Tawara Shrine''' is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]]. It was Ranked as a [[Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|Gosha]] shrine.<ref>[https://rnavi.ndl.go.jp/mokuji_html/023573933.html 大田村誌／2012.3.] リサーチ・ナビ 国立国会図書館</ref> Known for its [[:en:Nigori|Doburoku]] festival.
== Deities ==
* [[Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Amatsuhitakahikoho no Mikoto]]<ref>[http://www.weblio.jp/content/%E7%99%BD%E9%AC%9A%E7%94%B0%E5%8E%9F%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE 白鬚田原神社とは - 神社名] Weblio辞書</ref> * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume|Amen-Ukemikoto]] and 51 others.
== Doburoku Festival == The Doburoku Festival has continued for more than 1,300 years since [[:en:710|710]] ([[:en:Wadō (era)|Wado]] 3), and is held annually on October 17 and 18.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/enjoy/index.php?action=story&sub_cat_id=3 お祭りやイベント：楽しむ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>。In recent years, many areas have been designated as [[:en:Nigori|Doburoku Special Zones]] where the production of doburoku is allowed, but the shrine was the only one in Kyushu to be authorized by the National Tax Agency before the special zone for structural reform (special zone) began.<ref name="jr-odekake">{{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151003220345/http://guide.jr-odekake.net/event/26673|title=白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り：九州エリア}} JRおでかけネット </ref>
The festival consists of a festival on the day before the festival on October 17 and a grand festival on October 18. Doburoku is served on both days, and on the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. On the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|1=Intangible Folk Cultural Property that need measures such as documentation of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642584}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[:en:Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[:en:Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[:en:Nippō Main Line|Nippō Main Line]] [[:en:Kitsuki Station|Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|1=Intangible Folk Cultural Property that need measures such as documentation of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642584}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[:en:Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[:en:Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[:en:Nippō Main Line|Nippō Main Line]] [[:en:Kitsuki Station|Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

It was Ranked as a [[Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|Gosha]] shrine.<ref>[https://rnavi.ndl.go.jp/mokuji_html/023573933.html 大田村誌／2012.3.] リサーチ・ナビ 国立国会図書館</ref> Known for its [[:en:Nigori|Doburoku]] festival.
== Deities ==
* [[Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Amatsuhitakahikoho no Mikoto]]<ref>[http://www.weblio.jp/content/%E7%99%BD%E9%AC%9A%E7%94%B0%E5%8E%9F%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE 白鬚田原神社とは - 神社名] Weblio辞書</ref> * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume|Amen-Ukemikoto]] and 51 others.

The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|1=Intangible Folk Cultural Property that need measures such as documentation of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642584}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[:en:Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[:en:Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[:en:Nippō Main Line|Nippō Main Line]] [[:en:Kitsuki Station|Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Shirahigetawara Shrine]][[ja:白鬚田原神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Shirahigetawara Shrine]][[ja:白鬚田原神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Shirahigetawara Shrine]][[ja:白鬚田原神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q22119048]] Wikidata name: Shirahige tawara-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image = File:Sirahigetahara.jpg|location = {{ill|Kitsuki|WD=Q850359}}|coordinates = {{Coord|33.503211|N|131.549862|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} '''Shirahige-Tawara Shrine''' is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]]. It was Ranked as a [[Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|Gosha]] shrine.<ref>[https://rnavi.ndl.go.jp/mokuji_html/023573933.html 大田村誌／2012.3.] リサーチ・ナビ 国立国会図書館</ref> Known for its [[:en:Nigori|Doburoku]] festival.
== Deities ==
* [[Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Amatsuhitakahikoho no Mikoto]]<ref>[http://www.weblio.jp/content/%E7%99%BD%E9%AC%9A%E7%94%B0%E5%8E%9F%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE 白鬚田原神社とは - 神社名] Weblio辞書</ref> * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume|Amen-Ukemikoto]] and 51 others.
== Doburoku Festival == The Doburoku Festival has continued for more than 1,300 years since [[:en:710|710]] ([[:en:Wadō (era)|Wado]] 3), and is held annually on October 17 and 18.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/enjoy/index.php?action=story&sub_cat_id=3 お祭りやイベント：楽しむ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>。In recent years, many areas have been designated as [[:en:Nigori|Doburoku Special Zones]] where the production of doburoku is allowed, but the shrine was the only one in Kyushu to be authorized by the National Tax Agency before the special zone for structural reform (special zone) began.<ref name="jr-odekake">{{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151003220345/http://guide.jr-odekake.net/event/26673|title=白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り：九州エリア}} JRおでかけネット </ref>
The festival consists of a festival on the day before the festival on October 17 and a grand festival on October 18. Doburoku is served on both days, and on the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. On the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|1=Intangible Folk Cultural Property that need measures such as documentation of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642584}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[:en:Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[:en:Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[:en:Nippō Main Line|Nippō Main Line]] [[:en:Kitsuki Station|Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|1=Intangible Folk Cultural Property that need measures such as documentation of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642584}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[:en:Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[:en:Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[:en:Nippō Main Line|Nippō Main Line]] [[:en:Kitsuki Station|Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Shirahigetawara Shrine]][[ja:白鬚田原神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Shirahigetawara Shrine]][[ja:白鬚田原神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Shirahigetawara Shrine]][[ja:白鬚田原神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q22119048]] Wikidata name: Shirahige tawara-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:25, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image = File:Sirahigetahara.jpg|location = {{ill|Kitsuki|WD=Q850359}}|coordinates = {{Coord|33.503211|N|131.549862|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} '''Shirahige-Tawara Shrine''' is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]]. It was Ranked as a [[Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|Gosha]] shrine.<ref>[https://rnavi.ndl.go.jp/mokuji_html/023573933.html 大田村誌／2012.3.] リサーチ・ナビ 国立国会図書館</ref> Known for its [[:en:Nigori|Doburoku]] festival.
== Deities ==
* [[Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Amatsuhitakahikoho no Mikoto]]<ref>[http://www.weblio.jp/content/%E7%99%BD%E9%AC%9A%E7%94%B0%E5%8E%9F%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE 白鬚田原神社とは - 神社名] Weblio辞書</ref> * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume|Amen-Ukemikoto]] and 51 others.
== Doburoku Festival == The Doburoku Festival has continued for more than 1,300 years since [[:en:710|710]] ([[:en:Wadō (era)|Wado]] 3), and is held annually on October 17 and 18.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/enjoy/index.php?action=story&sub_cat_id=3 お祭りやイベント：楽しむ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>。In recent years, many areas have been designated as [[:en:Nigori|Doburoku Special Zones]] where the production of doburoku is allowed, but the shrine was the only one in Kyushu to be authorized by the National Tax Agency before the special zone for structural reform (special zone) began.<ref name="jr-odekake">{{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151003220345/http://guide.jr-odekake.net/event/26673|title=白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り：九州エリア}} JRおでかけネット </ref>
The festival consists of a festival on the day before the festival on October 17 and a grand festival on October 18. Doburoku is served on both days, and on the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. On the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|1=Intangible Folk Cultural Property that need measures such as documentation of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642584}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from [[:en:Ōita Airport Road|Oita Airport Road]] Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from [[:en:Kyushu Railway Company|JR Kyushu]] [[:en:Nippō Main Line|Nippō Main Line]] [[:en:Kitsuki Station|Kitsuki Station]].<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|1=Intangible Folk Cultural Property that need measures such as documentation of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642584}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from {{ill|Ōita Airport Road|en|Ōita Airport Road|WD=Q10933742|lt=Oita Airport Road}} Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from {{ill|Kyushu Railway Company|en|Kyushu Railway Company|WD=Q498366|lt=JR Kyushu}} {{ill|Nippō Main Line|en|Nippō Main Line|WD=Q1052288|lt=Nippō Main Line}} {{ill|Kitsuki Station|en|Kitsuki Station|WD=Q5360203|lt=Kitsuki Station}}.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

It was Ranked as a [[Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|Gosha]] shrine.<ref>[https://rnavi.ndl.go.jp/mokuji_html/023573933.html 大田村誌／2012.3.] リサーチ・ナビ 国立国会図書館</ref> Known for its {{ill|Nigori|en|Nigori|WD=Q60995819|lt=Doburoku}} festival.
== Deities ==
* [[Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Amatsuhitakahikoho no Mikoto]]<ref>[http://www.weblio.jp/content/%E7%99%BD%E9%AC%9A%E7%94%B0%E5%8E%9F%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE 白鬚田原神社とは - 神社名] Weblio辞書</ref> * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume|Amen-Ukemikoto]] and 51 others.
== Doburoku Festival == The Doburoku Festival has continued for more than 1,300 years since {{ill|710|en|710|WD=Q23518|lt=710}} ({{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wado}} 3), and is held annually on October 17 and 18.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/enjoy/index.php?action=story&sub_cat_id=3 お祭りやイベント：楽しむ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>。In recent years, many areas have been designated as {{ill|Nigori|en|Nigori|WD=Q60995819|lt=Doburoku Special Zones}} where the production of doburoku is allowed, but the shrine was the only one in Kyushu to be authorized by the National Tax Agency before the special zone for structural reform (special zone) began.<ref name="jr-odekake">{{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151003220345/http://guide.jr-odekake.net/event/26673|title=白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り：九州エリア}} JRおでかけネット </ref>
The festival consists of a festival on the day before the festival on October 17 and a grand festival on October 18. Doburoku is served on both days, and on the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. On the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|1=Intangible Folk Cultural Property that need measures such as documentation of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642584}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from {{ill|Ōita Airport Road|en|Ōita Airport Road|WD=Q10933742|lt=Oita Airport Road}} Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from {{ill|Kyushu Railway Company|en|Kyushu Railway Company|WD=Q498366|lt=JR Kyushu}} {{ill|Nippō Main Line|en|Nippō Main Line|WD=Q1052288|lt=Nippō Main Line}} {{ill|Kitsuki Station|en|Kitsuki Station|WD=Q5360203|lt=Kitsuki Station}}.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

* [[Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Amatsuhitakahikoho no Mikoto]]<ref>[http://www.weblio.jp/content/%E7%99%BD%E9%AC%9A%E7%94%B0%E5%8E%9F%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE 白鬚田原神社とは - 神社名] Weblio辞書</ref> * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume|Amen-Ukemikoto]] and 51 others.
== Doburoku Festival == The Doburoku Festival has continued for more than 1,300 years since {{ill|710|en|710|WD=Q23518|lt=710}} ({{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wado}} 3), and is held annually on October 17 and 18.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/enjoy/index.php?action=story&sub_cat_id=3 お祭りやイベント：楽しむ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>。In recent years, many areas have been designated as {{ill|Nigori|en|Nigori|WD=Q60995819|lt=Doburoku Special Zones}} where the production of doburoku is allowed, but the shrine was the only one in Kyushu to be authorized by the National Tax Agency before the special zone for structural reform (special zone) began.<ref name="jr-odekake">{{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151003220345/http://guide.jr-odekake.net/event/26673|title=白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り：九州エリア}} JRおでかけネット </ref>
The festival consists of a festival on the day before the festival on October 17 and a grand festival on October 18. Doburoku is served on both days, and on the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. On the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|1=Intangible Folk Cultural Property that need measures such as documentation of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642584}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from {{ill|Ōita Airport Road|en|Ōita Airport Road|WD=Q10933742|lt=Oita Airport Road}} Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from {{ill|Kyushu Railway Company|en|Kyushu Railway Company|WD=Q498366|lt=JR Kyushu}} {{ill|Nippō Main Line|en|Nippō Main Line|WD=Q1052288|lt=Nippō Main Line}} {{ill|Kitsuki Station|en|Kitsuki Station|WD=Q5360203|lt=Kitsuki Station}}.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>

{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image = File:Sirahigetahara.jpg|location = {{ill|Kitsuki|WD=Q850359|1=Kitsuki, Ōita}}|coordinates = {{Coord|33.503211|N|131.549862|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} '''Shirahige-Tawara Shrine''' is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Kitsuki, Ōita|en|Kitsuki, Ōita|WD=Q850359|lt=Kitsuki City|1=Kitsuki, Ōita}}, {{ill|Ōita Prefecture|en|Ōita Prefecture|WD=Q133924|lt=Oita Prefecture|1=Ōita Prefecture}}. It was Ranked as a [[Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|Gosha]] shrine.<ref>[https://rnavi.ndl.go.jp/mokuji_html/023573933.html 大田村誌／2012.3.] リサーチ・ナビ 国立国会図書館</ref> Known for its {{ill|Nigori|en|Nigori|WD=Q60995819|lt=Doburoku|1=Nigori}} festival.
== Deities ==
* [[Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Amatsuhitakahikoho no Mikoto]]<ref>[http://www.weblio.jp/content/%E7%99%BD%E9%AC%9A%E7%94%B0%E5%8E%9F%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE 白鬚田原神社とは - 神社名] Weblio辞書</ref> * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume|Amen-Ukemikoto]] and 51 others.
== Doburoku Festival == The Doburoku Festival has continued for more than 1,300 years since {{ill|710|en|710|WD=Q23518|lt=710|1=710}} ({{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wado|1=Wadō (era)}} 3), and is held annually on October 17 and 18.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/enjoy/index.php?action=story&sub_cat_id=3 お祭りやイベント：楽しむ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>。In recent years, many areas have been designated as {{ill|Nigori|en|Nigori|WD=Q60995819|lt=Doburoku Special Zones|1=Nigori}} where the production of doburoku is allowed, but the shrine was the only one in Kyushu to be authorized by the National Tax Agency before the special zone for structural reform (special zone) began.<ref name="jr-odekake">{{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151003220345/http://guide.jr-odekake.net/event/26673|title=白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り：九州エリア}} JRおでかけネット </ref>
The festival consists of a festival on the day before the festival on October 17 and a grand festival on October 18. Doburoku is served on both days, and on the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. On the 18th, a [[mikoshi]] parade is held. In addition, a "Beard Boast Contest" is held in two categories, one for black hair and the other for beards, named after the shrine.<ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/10/post_20141018051804.html 美しく、長く…鬚自慢 杵築の白鬚田原神社] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 10月18日</ref>
The series of events that began on September 25 and continued until the annual festival on October 18 were selected as '''Kunitoh no toya event''' by the government on December 20, 1984 (Showa 59) as an {{ill|Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|ja|記録作成等の措置を講ずべき無形の民俗文化財|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Intangible folk cultural property for which measures such as record making should be taken|1=Intangible Folk Cultural Properties Requiring Documentation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642584}}.<ref>[https://bunka.nii.ac.jp/heritages/detail/161301 国東のとうや行事] - [[:ja:文化遺産オンライン|文化遺産オンライン]]（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref><ref>[https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/312/577 国東のとうや行事] - 国指定文化財等データベース（[[:ja:文化庁|文化庁]]）</ref> It was also selected as a '''Doburoku Festival of Shirahige Shrine''' by Oita Prefecture on March 23, 1971 as a ''Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property. <ref>[http://www.city.kitsuki.lg.jp/soshiki/24/ootatiiki-siteibunnkazaiitirann.html 大田地域 指定文化財一覧] 杵築市</ref><ref>[http://www.47news.jp/localnews/oita/2014/09/post_20140925174904.html うまい一杯になあれ 白鬚田原神社でどぶろく仕込み - 大分のニュース] 47NEWS（よんななニュース）、2014th year 9月25日</ref>
== Transportation ==
* 20 minutes drive from {{ill|Ōita Airport Road|en|Ōita Airport Road|WD=Q10933742|lt=Oita Airport Road|1=Ōita Airport Road}} Kitsuki IC. * During the Doburoku Festival, a temporary bus service is available from {{ill|Kyushu Railway Company|en|Kyushu Railway Company|WD=Q498366|lt=JR Kyushu|1=Kyushu Railway Company}} {{ill|Nippō Main Line|en|Nippō Main Line|WD=Q1052288|lt=Nippō Main Line|1=Nippō Main Line}} {{ill|Kitsuki Station|en|Kitsuki Station|WD=Q5360203|lt=Kitsuki Station|1=Kitsuki Station}}.<ref>[http://www.kit-suki.com/news/index.php?action=story&story_id=546 白鬚田原神社 どぶろく祭り 開催(10/17～10/18)のお知らせ] 杵築市観光協会</ref>
